briefdescription.para: Construct from the top-level deconvolution parameter file.

detaileddescription.para: The constructor reads the frequency_domain_gid_deconvolution branch, builds the configured leaf inverse operator, and initializes the signal, noise, and FFT processing windows.

parameterdescription.para: top-level Antelope parameter file for the deconvolution operator.

briefdescription.para: Update operator parameters from a Metadata container.
Load the three-component signal data used for deconvolution.

detaileddescription.para: The input seismogram is windowed to dwin. The supplied window must contain the configured deconvolution FFT window.

parameterdescription.para: full data window to retain around the deconvolution interval.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and 1 if the requested data window is unusable.

briefdescription.para: Load the residual-domain noise window from a seismogram.

parameterdescription.para: input three-component seismogram containing the noise window.
time window used to estimate residual noise.

simplesect.para: 0 on success and 1 if the requested noise window is unusable.

briefdescription.para: Load an externally supplied source wavelet.

detaileddescription.para: External wavelets are accepted only when enabled by the configuration and must match the configured target sample interval.

parameterdescription.para: source wavelet to use instead of the internally estimated one.

briefdescription.para: Load an externally supplied core source wavelet.

parameterdescription.para: core time series converted to a TimeSeries wavelet.

briefdescription.para: Load an externally supplied scalar noise estimate.

detaileddescription.para: The sample interval must match the configured target sample interval. If no residual-domain noise seismogram is already loaded, this vector is also used to synthesize the residual noise estimate required by the sparse iteration.

briefdescription.para: Load an externally supplied core scalar noise estimate.

parameterdescription.para: core time series converted to a TimeSeries noise waveform.

briefdescription.para: Load an externally supplied noise power spectrum.

detaileddescription.para: This overload is supported for ns_gid and group_sparse modes where the leaf inverse operator uses the spectrum for noise-stable regularization.

parameterdescription.para: spectrum that covers DC and describes noise power.

detaileddescription.para: Clear any externally loaded wavelet and invalidate processed state.
Clear externally loaded noise or noise spectrum and invalidate state.
Return the configured deconvolution-window start time.
Return the configured deconvolution-window end time.
Return the current residual-noise window start time.
Return the current residual-noise window end time.
Return the serialized configuration parameter-file text.
Return true if changeparameter has updated the leaf inverse operator.
Return the metadata most recently passed to changeparameter.
Return true if an external wavelet is currently loaded.
Return true if an external scalar noise waveform is currently loaded.
Return true if an external noise power spectrum is currently loaded.
Return the loaded external wavelet, or an empty TimeSeries if absent.
Return the loaded external noise, or an empty TimeSeries if absent.
Return the loaded external noise spectrum, or an empty spectrum.

briefdescription.para: Load signal and residual-noise windows from one seismogram.

detaileddescription.para: This convenience overload calls loadnoise(d, nwin) and load(d, dwin).

parameterdescription.para: full data window to retain around the deconvolution interval.
time window used to estimate residual noise.

simplesect.para: sum of the signal and noise load return codes.

briefdescription.para: Run the configured sparse GID iteration.

detaileddescription.para: Processing requires both a loaded data window and a loaded residual-noise estimate. The method resets prior processed products before computing a new inverse operator, sparse spike train, and QC state.
The sparse output is convolved with the configured shaping wavelet and returned in the loaded data window.

briefdescription.para: Return the unshaped sparse spike train.

detaileddescription.para: Values are inserted at the selected sparse lags in a seismogram aligned with the loaded data window.
Return the final lag weights used by the sparse picker.
Legacy alias for output_shaping_wavelet inherited from ScalarDecon.
Return the resolution kernel of the active leaf inverse operator.
Return the inverse wavelet using a zero parent start time.

briefdescription.para: Return the inverse wavelet with the parent time correction.

parameterdescription.para: start time of the parent waveform used to set output time.

detaileddescription.para: Each operator commonly has different was to measure the quality of the result. This method should return these in a generic Metadata object.

This engine shares the sparse GID iteration semantics of TimeDomainGIDDecon but applies the candidate inverse operator in the frequency domain. Processing requires both a loaded signal window and residual-domain noise window. External PowerSpectrum noise is accepted by ns_gid and group_sparse because both use NS-GID inverse-operator regularization; it does not replace load(d, dwin, nwin) or loadnoise(d, nwin).
